name: Felafel-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the batter in a food processor and process until well combined.
2. Chill the batter for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Divide the batter into twelve equal portions and shape each portion into a patty about 3 inches in diameter.
4. Dust each patty lightly with flour.
5. Heat oil in a heavy skillet to 365°F (185°C).
6. Carefully lower the patties into the hot oil using tongs or a spatula.
7. Fry the felafel until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Remove the felafel with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve the fried felafel in pitas with lettuce, tomatoes, and drizzle with the prepared felafel sauce.
